name: elimu-mcp
description: MCP server for Kenya education system — school registry, KCSE/KCPE results lookup, HELB loans, TVET programs, and literacy resources. 5 tools.

tools.name: school_finder
tools.description: Find government or private schools in a Kenya county by level (primary/secondary/TVET).

tools.name: exam_results_guide
tools.description: Guide to accessing KCPE and KCSE results, grading system, and cluster points. DEMO.

tools.name: helb_loan_info
tools.description: HELB loan eligibility, application process, repayment terms, and loan types for Kenyan students.

tools.name: tvet_programs
tools.description: Query TVET programs available in Kenya by trade, county, or institution. Returns NQF level and duration.

tools.name: literacy_resources
tools.description: Kenya Adult Education resources, literacy programs, and continuing education pathways.
